title: Senior Doctor - Bombay Hospital South Asia Partners - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Bombay Hospital South Asia Partners - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Bombay Hospital South Asia Partners in Allahabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Bombay Hospital South Asia Partners:
Bombay Hospital South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bombay Hospital South Asia Partners!
